title: Fedora Council Seeks to Shutdown Current Discussions over AI Developer Desktop
abstract: The Fedora Council aims to evaluate and, if necessary, terminate the current project to ensure the community's focus remains on innovation and user satisfaction.
abstract_zh: 这不就是说Fedora这个社区项目要是不创新不求新也不考虑用户感受了，FC（Fedora Council）就得把项目给毙了？想想就头疼啊！朋友你懂的，得赶紧让项目负责人抖抖精神，想点新东西出来别被灭掉。
